title: New Classic Toys Wooden Xylophone Toy for Toddlers 2 Years Old Boys and Girls Baby Gifts, Kids Musical Instruments for Childrens Two Year Old,Multicolor,DeLuxe - 12 bars,10236
features: This colorful wooden toy xylophone from New Classic Toys is a fantastic way to introduce little ones to the wonderful world of making music.
Perfect for encouraging melody makers, or just having fun making lots of noise.
This xylophone is made up of 12 colored bars.
Comes complete with a wooden pair of beaters and a color-coded music book with a short explanation featuring 6 melodies/songs to help children play their first tunes.
This imitation toy is suitable from 2 years old.
description: This colorful xylophone is perfect for little budding musicans who love to make sounds. It is both fun, educational and an ideal musical instrument to use for developing children's hand-eye coordination and encouraging musical creativity. Complete with a pair of wooden beaters. This xylophone is part of the New Classic Toys "First Melodies" productline. What is nicer than making music? Guitars, pianos, metallophones and other toy instruments for a lot of fun and musical development. New Classic Toys makes it possible that traditionally playing is being passed through to next generation in a contemporary way. In addition to our own brand, you'll find a collection of well-renowned brands that fit with our business philosophy. So we can ensure that every child play can be instructive and valuable. New Classic Toys offers a range of toys and toy-related products that contribute to a positive development of a child. One of the first demands we want our products to meet is that safety comes first, all our products meet the safety requirements according to the EN-71 standard. We carefully selected the collection of fair and sustainable materials. New Classic Toys stands for quality, reliability and excellent service.
